---
title: "KPMP DKD analysis"
author: "Kanako Terakawa"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r packages}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratObject)
library(SeuratDisk)
library(BPCells)
library(hdf5r)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
library(GWmodel)
library(spdep)
library(edgeR)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(EnhancedVolcano)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)
library(fgsea)
library(msigdbr)
```

```{r Data loading, Pre-processing, warning=FALSE}
# Settings
ROOT_DIR_DKD <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/KPMP_DKD_ST_data"

# put the downloaded DKD sample IDs here
sampleNames_DKD <- c("27-10039", "27-10041", "27-10042", "27-10047", 
                 "27-10067", "27-10071", "27-10074", "27-10094", 
                 "27-10157", "28-12178", "28-12265-C", "28-12265-M", 
                 "29-10016", "29-10277", "29-10282", "29-10394", 
                 "29-10398", "29-10399", "29-10404", "29-10405", 
                 "29-10408", "29-10419", "29-10420", "29-10422", 
                 "29-10423", "29-10439", "31-10040", "31-10081", 
                 "31-10100", "31-10236")

# Load and merge
seurat_list_dkd <- list()

for (sample in sampleNames_DKD) {
  input_dir <- file.path(ROOT_DIR_DKD, sample, "outs")
  
  if (file.exists(file.path(input_dir, "filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5"))) {
    print(paste("Loading:", sample))
    obj <- Load10X_Spatial(
      data.dir = input_dir,
      filename = "filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5",
      slice    = sample
    )
    obj$orig.ident  <- sample
    obj$disease     <- "DKD"   # label to distinguish from DKD
    seurat_list_dkd[[sample]] <- obj
  } else {
    warning(paste("File not found for:", sample))
  }
}

if (length(seurat_list_dkd) > 0) {
  merged_dkd <- merge(seurat_list_dkd[[1]], y = seurat_list_dkd[-1])
  rm(seurat_list_dkd); gc()
  message("DKD loaded: ", ncol(merged_dkd), " spots")
} else {
  stop("No DKD data loaded.")
}
```

```{r outdir}
outdir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/KPMP analysis for paper/DKD/"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r fixed_params}
# Fixed parameters (identical to the KPMP DKD analysis)
FINAL_FIB_GENES <- c(
  "ITGBL1", "INHBA", "NALCN", "LMOD1", "GLI2", "COL6A3", "ANO3",
  "CARMN", "PRRX1", "PDLIM3", "ANO1", "THBS2", "SULF1", "DPYSL3",
  "COL16A1", "COL5A1", "COL1A1", "NKD1", "ITGA11", "TRPC4", "EDNRA",
  "GUCY1A2", "MYH11", "CDH11", "NTM", "RAMP1", "PRR16", "PTGIS", "SYNPO2"
)

MAC_M2_SCORE_COL <- "prediction.score.MAC.M2"
GWR_FORMULA_STR  <- "Y_Fibrosis ~ X_M2 + Cov_logUMI"
f_main           <- as.formula(GWR_FORMULA_STR)

GWR_COEF_THRESHOLD   <- 0
GWR_FDR_THRESHOLD    <- 0.05
MIN_HIGHCOUPLING_SPOTS <- 20
MIN_REFERENCE_SPOTS    <- 20

QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN <- 500
QC_MEDIAN_MITO_MAX     <- 25
QC_MIN_SPOTS           <- 100
QC_SPOT_NFEATURE_MIN   <- 500
QC_SPOT_MITO_MAX       <- 25

cat("=== Fixed Parameters ===\n")
cat("Fibrosis genes (n =", length(FINAL_FIB_GENES), "):",
    paste(FINAL_FIB_GENES, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("GWR formula   :", GWR_FORMULA_STR, "\n")
cat("QC nFeature   : >=", QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN, "\n")
```

```{r QC~deconvulsion}
# QC
merged_dkd[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(merged_dkd,
                                                    pattern = "^MT-",
                                                    assay = "Spatial")

sample_qc_stats <- merged_dkd@meta.data %>%
  group_by(orig.ident) %>%
  summarise(
    Median_nFeature = median(nFeature_Spatial),
    Median_Mito     = median(percent.mt),
    n_Spots         = n()
  )
print(sample_qc_stats)

keep_samples <- sample_qc_stats %>%
  filter(Median_nFeature >= QC_MEDIAN_NFEATURE_MIN,
         Median_Mito     <= QC_MEDIAN_MITO_MAX,
         n_Spots         >= QC_MIN_SPOTS) %>%
  pull(orig.ident)

cat("Keeping samples:", length(keep_samples), "/", 
    length(unique(merged_dkd$orig.ident)), "\n")

merged_dkd <- subset(merged_dkd,
                     subset = orig.ident %in% keep_samples &
                              nFeature_Spatial > QC_SPOT_NFEATURE_MIN &
                              percent.mt       < QC_SPOT_MITO_MAX)
cat("Spots after QC:", ncol(merged_dkd), "\n")

# Normalization -> PCA
merged_dkd <- NormalizeData(merged_dkd,
                            normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
                            scale.factor = 10000,
                            assay = "Spatial")
merged_dkd <- FindVariableFeatures(merged_dkd,
                                   selection.method = "vst",
                                   nfeatures = 2000)
merged_dkd <- ScaleData(merged_dkd)
merged_dkd <- RunPCA(merged_dkd, assay = "Spatial", verbose = FALSE)

# Standardize sample names
merged_dkd$orig.ident <- make.names(merged_dkd$orig.ident)
keep_samples          <- make.names(keep_samples)
Idents(merged_dkd)    <- merged_dkd$orig.ident

cat("Layers after normalize:", Layers(merged_dkd[["Spatial"]]), "\n")
cat("Reductions:", Reductions(merged_dkd), "\n")

# Deconvolution (assumes ref_seurat is already loaded)
merged_dkd <- FindVariableFeatures(merged_dkd, nfeatures = 2000)
merged_dkd <- ScaleData(merged_dkd)
merged_dkd <- RunPCA(merged_dkd, verbose = FALSE)

anchors <- FindTransferAnchors(
  reference            = ref_seurat,
  query                = merged_dkd,
  normalization.method = "LogNormalize",
  reference.reduction  = "pca",
  dims                 = 1:30
)

predictions <- TransferData(
  anchorset        = anchors,
  refdata          = ref_seurat$subclass.l2,
  weight.reduction = merged_dkd[["pca"]],
  dims             = 1:30
)

merged_dkd$M2Mac_fraction <- predictions[[MAC_M2_SCORE_COL]]
cat("M2Mac_fraction summary:\n")
print(summary(merged_dkd$M2Mac_fraction))
```


```{r fibrosis_score}
# Fibrosis Score
final_fib_genes <- intersect(FINAL_FIB_GENES, rownames(merged_dkd))
genes_missing   <- setdiff(FINAL_FIB_GENES, rownames(merged_dkd))

cat("=== Fibrosis Gene Coverage (DKD) ===\n")
cat("Fixed gene-list size      :", length(FINAL_FIB_GENES), "\n")
cat("Present in DKD data         :", length(final_fib_genes), "\n")
if (length(genes_missing) > 0)
  cat("Missing                 :", paste(genes_missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
cat("Genes used              :", paste(final_fib_genes, collapse = ", "), "\n")

# Join layers
merged_dkd <- JoinLayers(merged_dkd, assay = "Spatial")

# check
Layers(merged_dkd[["Spatial"]])
# OK if it prints "counts" "data"

# add before AddModuleScore
DefaultAssay(merged_dkd) <- "Spatial"

if (length(final_fib_genes) >= 5) {
  merged_dkd <- AddModuleScore(
    merged_dkd,
    features = list(final_fib_genes),
    name     = "Fibrosis_Score"
  )
  merged_dkd$Fibrosis_Score  <- merged_dkd$Fibrosis_Score1
  merged_dkd$Fibrosis_Score1 <- NULL
  cat("\nFibrosis_Score summary:\n")
  print(summary(merged_dkd$Fibrosis_Score))
  print("OK: Fibrosis_Score updated (merged_dkd)")
} else {
  stop("Error: fewer than 5 shared genes")
}
```


```{r GWR}
# 1. Get coordinates (prefer grid coordinates)
print("Extracting coordinates...")
img_names <- Images(merged_seurat)
all_coords_list <- list()

for (img in img_names) {
  c_data <- GetTissueCoordinates(merged_seurat, image = img)
  c_data$Barcode <- rownames(c_data) 
  all_coords_list[[img]] <- c_data
}

all_coords <- do.call(rbind, all_coords_list)
cols <- colnames(all_coords)
y_col <- grep("row|y", cols, ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]
x_col <- grep("col|x", cols, ignore.case = TRUE, value = TRUE)[1]

all_coords$final_x <- all_coords[[x_col]]
all_coords$final_y <- all_coords[[y_col]]

# 2'. Build GWR input (add logUMI)
meta_df <- merged_seurat@meta.data
meta_df$Barcode <- rownames(meta_df)

# log-transform UMI counts
meta_df$log10_UMI <- log10(meta_df$nCount_Spatial + 1)

gwr_data <- merge(meta_df, all_coords, by = "Barcode")

gwr_input <- data.frame(
  Barcode       = gwr_data$Barcode,
  Sample        = as.character(gwr_data$orig.ident), 
  x             = gwr_data$final_x,
  y             = gwr_data$final_y,
  Y_Fibrosis    = gwr_data$Fibrosis_Score,
  X_M2          = gwr_data$M2Mac_fraction,
  Cov_logUMI    = gwr_data$log10_UMI
) %>% na.omit()

# check: does gwr_input really have the required columns?
print("--- [CHECK] gwr_input columns ---")
print(colnames(gwr_input))

# required-column check
required_cols <- c("Y_Fibrosis", "X_M2", "Cov_logUMI")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, colnames(gwr_input))

if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop(paste("STOP! gwr_input is missing these columns:", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", ")))
} else {
  print("OK! all required columns are present.")
}

# peek at the data (check it isn't all NA)
print("--- [CHECK] Data Preview ---")
print(head(gwr_input))
print(summary(gwr_input$Cov_logUMI)) # sanity-check logUMI

# 3'. Run GWR loop (model with covariate)
gwr_results_list <- list()
unique_samples <- unique(gwr_input$Sample)

# define the model formula (as a formula object, not a string)
f_main <- as.formula("Y_Fibrosis ~ X_M2 + Cov_logUMI")

print("Running Main GWR Model (log10UMI ver.)...")

for (s in unique_samples) {
sub_data <- subset(gwr_input, Sample == s)
  if (nrow(sub_data) < 50) next
  
  print(paste("Processing:", s, "| Spots:", nrow(sub_data)))
  
  # convert to SpatialPointsDataFrame
  # sub_data (which includes Cov_logUMI) is used as-is, so sp_sub will contain Cov_logUMI
  sp_sub <- sub_data
  coordinates(sp_sub) <- ~x+y
  
  tryCatch({
    # bandwidth selection (using the main formula)
    bw <- bw.gwr(f_main, data = sp_sub, approach = "AIC", kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE)
    
    # fit model
    model <- gwr.basic(f_main, data = sp_sub, bw = bw, kernel = "bisquare", adaptive = TRUE)
    
    # with a covariate there are multiple coefficients; take only the X_M2 coefficient
    res <- as.data.frame(model$SDF)
    
# p-value (for the M2 coefficient)
    # with a covariate, res contains "Intercept", "X_M2", "Cov_logUMI", ...
    # so res$X_M2_TV gives the t-value
    raw_p <- 2 * (1 - pnorm(abs(res$X_M2_TV)))
    adj_p <- p.adjust(raw_p, method = "BH")
    
    gwr_results_list[[s]] <- data.frame(
      Barcode  = sub_data$Barcode,
      Sample   = s,
      M2_Coeff = res$X_M2,        # M2 coefficient
      M2_AdjP  = adj_p,           # adjusted p-value for M2
      M2_t_val = res$X_M2_TV
    )
  }, error = function(e) { print(paste("Error:", s, e$message)) })
}

# 4'. Merge and check results
if (length(gwr_results_list) > 0) {
  final_results <- do.call(rbind, gwr_results_list)
  rownames(final_results) <- final_results$Barcode
  path_spots    <- file.path(ROOT_DIR, "spots.csv")
path_spots    <- file.path(ROOT_DIR, "spots.csv")

# revised code
# 1. key on the Barcode of the merged results (final_results)
# 2. reorder to match the Seurat object's Barcode order
target_barcodes <- rownames(merged_seurat@meta.data)
matched_indices <- match(target_barcodes, final_results$Barcode)

# 3. assign per column (non-matches become NA)
merged_seurat$M2_Coeff <- final_results$M2_Coeff[matched_indices]
merged_seurat$M2_AdjP  <- final_results$M2_AdjP[matched_indices]
merged_seurat$M2_t_val <- final_results$M2_t_val[matched_indices]

print("Metadata securely updated.")

  # count high-coupling spots (e.g., ~400-600 for X29.10394 when successful)
  sig_summary <- merged_seurat@meta.data %>%
    group_by(orig.ident) %>%
    summarise(n_HighCoupling = sum(M2_Coeff > 0 & M2_AdjP < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    arrange(desc(n_HighCoupling))
    
  print("--- High-Coupling Spot Counts (Check if numbers are high) ---")
  capture.output(print(sig_summary, n = 30))
}
```

```{r Differential Gene Expression Analysis}
# 5'. Prepare for DEG analysis

# GWR result summary
sig_summary <- merged_seurat@meta.data %>%
  group_by(orig.ident) %>%
  summarise(
    n_Analyzed       = sum(!is.na(M2_AdjP)),
    n_HighCoupling   = sum(M2_Coeff > 0 & M2_AdjP < 0.05, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_Reference      = n_Analyzed - n_HighCoupling,
    Pct_HighCoupling = n_HighCoupling / n_Analyzed * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Pct_HighCoupling))

print("--- GWR summary ---")
print(sig_summary, n = 30)

# select samples for analysis
valid_samples <- sig_summary %>%
  filter(n_HighCoupling >= 20, n_Reference >= 20) %>%
  pull(orig.ident)

print("--- Valid samples ---")
print(valid_samples)

if (length(valid_samples) < 2) {
  stop("Fewer than 2 valid samples; DEG analysis requires at least 2.")
}

# 5.5'. restrict to GWR-evaluable spots
sub_obj <- subset(
  merged_seurat,
  subset = orig.ident %in% valid_samples &
           !is.na(M2_Coeff) &
           !is.na(M2_AdjP)
)

cat("Spots retained for DEG:", ncol(sub_obj), "\n")

# sanity check
cat("Any NA in M2_Coeff?: ", any(is.na(sub_obj$M2_Coeff)), "\n")
cat("Any NA in M2_AdjP?:  ", any(is.na(sub_obj$M2_AdjP)), "\n")
# 5.6'. build HighCoupling / Reference labels
sub_obj$CouplingLabel <- ifelse(
  sub_obj$M2_Coeff > 0 & sub_obj$M2_AdjP < 0.05,
  "HighCoupling",
  "Reference"
)

# build pseudo_group (use "-" from the start, since AggregateExpression converts "_" to "-")
sub_obj$pseudo_group <- paste(sub_obj$orig.ident, sub_obj$CouplingLabel, sep = "-")

# check
print("--- CouplingLabel counts ---")
print(table(sub_obj$CouplingLabel, useNA = "ifany"))

print("--- Any malformed pseudo_group? ---")
print(unique(sub_obj$pseudo_group[grepl("-NA$", sub_obj$pseudo_group)]))

if (any(grepl("-NA$", sub_obj$pseudo_group))) {
  stop("pseudo_group contains *-NA.")
}

# 5.7'. build pseudobulk counts
print("Aggregating expression data...")
agg_data <- AggregateExpression(
  sub_obj,
  group.by = "pseudo_group",
  assays = "Spatial",
  slot = "counts",
  return.seurat = FALSE
)

counts_matrix <- agg_data$Spatial

print("--- counts_matrix columns ---")
print(colnames(counts_matrix))

# check for unexpected columns
unexpected_cols <- colnames(counts_matrix)[
  !grepl("-HighCoupling$", colnames(counts_matrix)) &
  !grepl("-Reference$", colnames(counts_matrix))
]

if (length(unexpected_cols) > 0) {
  stop(
    paste("Unexpected column names in counts_matrix:",
          paste(unexpected_cols, collapse = ", "))
  )
}

# 5.8'. build targets metadata
sample_names <- colnames(counts_matrix)

conditions <- ifelse(
  grepl("-HighCoupling$", sample_names), "HighCoupling",
  ifelse(grepl("-Reference$", sample_names), "Reference", NA)
)

if (any(is.na(conditions))) {
  stop("Condition contains NA; check the column-name format.")
}

ids <- sample_names
ids <- sub("-HighCoupling$", "", ids)
ids <- sub("-Reference$", "", ids)

targets <- data.frame(
  row.names = sample_names,
  SampleID  = factor(ids),
  Condition = factor(conditions, levels = c("Reference", "HighCoupling"))
)

# 6'. Run DEG analysis
outdir <- "/path/to/KPMP_DKD_ST_project/analysis_for_paper/KPMP/DKD"
dir.create(outdir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%d_%H%M%S")

# edgeR
y <- DGEList(counts = counts_matrix, group = targets$Condition)
y <- calcNormFactors(y)

design <- model.matrix(~ SampleID + Condition, data = targets)

print("--- design matrix ---")
print(colnames(design))
cat("Degrees of freedom:", nrow(targets) - ncol(design), "\n")

y   <- estimateDisp(y, design, robust = TRUE)
fit <- glmQLFit(y, design, robust = TRUE)
qlf <- glmQLFTest(fit, coef = ncol(design))

# all results
all_results <- topTags(qlf, n = Inf)$table

# significant genes
sig_genes <- subset(all_results, FDR <= 0.05)
sig_genes <- sig_genes[order(sig_genes$logFC, decreasing = TRUE), ]

cat("\n=== DEG Results (HighCoupling vs Reference) ===\n")
cat("Genes tested :", nrow(all_results), "\n")
cat("FDR < 0.05    :", nrow(sig_genes), "\n")
cat("Up (HighCoupling > Reference) :", sum(sig_genes$logFC > 0), "\n")
cat("Down (HighCoupling < Reference) :", sum(sig_genes$logFC < 0), "\n")

print(head(sig_genes, 20))

# Save
write.csv(
  all_results,
  file.path(outdir, paste0("EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_all_", timestamp, ".csv"))
)

write.csv(
  sig_genes,
  file.path(outdir, paste0("EdgeR_HighCoupling_vs_Reference_FDR0.05_", timestamp, ".csv"))
)

cat("Saved to:", outdir, "\n")
```
